items.title: Watch: Vance heckled as he chides Pope
items.dek: The US Vice-President was speaking at a Turning Point USA event, where he said Pope Leo should "be careful when he talks about matters of theology."
items.body: The US Vice-President was speaking at a Turning Point USA event, where he said Pope Leo should "be careful when he talks about matters of theology."
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Trump hints Iran talks could resume this week as US port blockade continues
items.dek: The United Nations' secretary general said it was "highly probable" that the negotiations would restart.
items.body: The United Nations' secretary general said it was "highly probable" that the negotiations would restart.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: 250 missing after migrant boat sinks in Indian Ocean
items.dek: The trawler "reportedly sank due to heavy winds, rough seas and overcrowding", the United Nations said.
items.body: The trawler "reportedly sank due to heavy winds, rough seas and overcrowding", the United Nations said.
items.author: IriLine Desk
